# NichePulse 🎯 — AI-Powered Niche Scoring

**Stop guessing which niches to pursue. Start scoring them.**

NichePulse uses a data-driven 5-dimension framework to evaluate any niche for print-on-demand, digital products, or e-commerce.

## Quick Start

```bash
pip install nichepulse
nichepulse list --top 10
nichepulse score mushroom-foraging
```

## What's Included

- **CLI Tool** — Score, compare, and get roadmaps for any niche
- **3 Claude Code Skills** — Niche Research, SEO Audit, Content Pipeline
- **MCP Server** — Integrate with any AI agent workflow
- **Pre-scored database** — 14 niches already validated with 2026 market data

## The 5-Dimension Framework

Passion • Buy Frequency • Gift Potential • Competition → Trend

Each 1-5. Total /25. Graded S through D.

## Installation

```bash
pip install nichepulse
```

## Pro Bundle ($39)

Everything + roadmap templates, private Discord, lifetime updates.
